task: Write a bash script at /tmp/clive/weather.sh that wraps the Open-Meteo API. It should accept a city name, look up coordinates, fetch the current weather, and print a formatted report (temperature, wind speed, condition). Test with 'München'. Write output to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a Python script at /tmp/clive/process.py that reads /tmp/clive/input.csv, groups rows by 'category', computes sum and average of 'amount' per category, and writes a summary CSV to /tmp/clive/result.csv. No external dependencies.

initial_state.setup: echo 'id,category,amount,date' > /tmp/clive/input.csv && echo '1,A,100,2026-04-01' >> /tmp/clive/input.csv && echo '2,B,200,2026-04-01' >> /tmp/clive/input.csv && echo '3,A,150,2026-04-02' >> /tmp/clive/input.csv && echo '4,C,300,2026-04-02' >> /tmp/clive/input.csv && echo '5,B,250,2026-04-03' >> /tmp/clive/input.csv && echo '6,A,175,2026-04-03' >> /tmp/clive/input.csv

task: Write a robust bash script at /tmp/clive/safe_download.sh that downloads a URL (first arg) to a destination (second arg). Handle: missing args (print usage), unreachable host (retry 3 times), disk full, and existing file (prompt overwrite). Test with https://httpbin.org/get. Write status to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a bash script at /tmp/clive/db_setup.sh that creates a SQLite database at /tmp/clive/app.db with tables: users (id, name, email, created_at), tasks (id, user_id, title, status, created_at). Insert 5 sample records into each table. Query the database to verify. Write the query results to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a Python script at /tmp/clive/report.py that generates an HTML report from /tmp/clive/data.csv. Include: a summary table, total/average statistics, and color-coded rows (red for values below threshold 100). Write HTML to /tmp/clive/result.html.

initial_state.setup: echo 'product,region,sales' > /tmp/clive/data.csv && echo 'Widget A,North,250' >> /tmp/clive/data.csv && echo 'Widget A,South,80' >> /tmp/clive/data.csv && echo 'Widget B,North,150' >> /tmp/clive/data.csv && echo 'Widget B,South,60' >> /tmp/clive/data.csv && echo 'Widget C,North,320' >> /tmp/clive/data.csv && echo 'Widget C,South,180' >> /tmp/clive/data.csv

task: Write a bash script at /tmp/clive/scheduler.sh that reads tasks from /tmp/clive/schedule.json and executes them based on their scheduled time. For this test, execute all 'pending' tasks immediately and mark them as 'done'. Write execution log to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a bash REST client script at /tmp/clive/rest.sh that supports CRUD operations against https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com. Subcommands: get <id>, list, create <title>, delete <id>. Test all operations and write output to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a data migration script at /tmp/clive/migrate.sh that converts JSON records at /tmp/clive/old_format.json to a new schema: rename 'full_name' to 'name', split into 'first_name' and 'last_name', add 'migrated_at' timestamp. Write to /tmp/clive/result.json.

success_criteria.check: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/clive/result.json')); assert all('first_name' in r and 'last_name' in r for r in d); assert d[0]['first_name']=='Kiu'"

task: Write a monitoring script at /tmp/clive/monitor.sh that checks: 1) disk usage, 2) memory usage, 3) CPU load, 4) network connectivity (ping google.com). If any metric is critical, write 'ALERT: {metric} is critical' to /tmp/clive/result.txt. Otherwise write 'ALL_HEALTHY'.

Write an ETL (Extract-Transform-Load) script at /tmp/clive/etl.sh. Extract: read /tmp/clive/raw_data.json. Transform: normalize email to lowercase, parse dates to ISO format, remove records with missing fields. Load: write clean data to /tmp/clive/result.json with a stats summary to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

success_criteria.check: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/clive/result.json')); assert len(d)==3; assert all(r['email']==r['email'].lower() for r in d)"

task: Write a pre-commit hook script at /tmp/clive/pre-commit.sh that: 1) checks for Python syntax errors (python3 -m py_compile), 2) checks for TODO/FIXME markers, 3) checks for files over 1MB. Test it against sample files. Write test results to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo 'print("valid")' > /tmp/clive/good.py && echo 'print("has TODO: fix this")' > /tmp/clive/todo.py && echo 'def broken(:' > /tmp/clive/bad.py

task: Write a notification dispatcher script at /tmp/clive/notify.sh that reads notification rules from /tmp/clive/rules.json and recent events from /tmp/clive/events.log. Match events to rules and generate notifications. Write notifications to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo '[{"pattern":"ERROR","action":"email kiu@ikangai.com","severity":"high"},{"pattern":"WARN","action":"log to /tmp/clive/warnings.log","severity":"medium"}]' > /tmp/clive/rules.json && echo '2026-04-09 10:00 INFO System started' > /tmp/clive/events.log && echo '2026-04-09 10:15 ERROR Database connection failed' >> /tmp/clive/events.log && echo '2026-04-09 10:20 WARN High memory usage' >> /tmp/clive/events.log && echo '2026-04-09 10:25 ERROR Disk space critical' >> /tmp/clive/events.log

task: Write a simple template engine script at /tmp/clive/template.sh that reads a template file with {{variable}} placeholders and a JSON data file, then renders the template. Test with an invoice template and data. Write rendered output to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a local CI pipeline script at /tmp/clive/ci.sh that: 1) runs linting (shellcheck or python3 -m py_compile on all scripts), 2) runs tests (echo-based test assertions), 3) builds a distributable (tar.gz), 4) generates a report. Write the CI report to /tmp/clive/result.txt with pass/fail per stage.

Write a config management script at /tmp/clive/config.sh that supports: 'get <key>' to read a config value, 'set <key> <value>' to update it, 'list' to show all, 'diff <file1> <file2>' to compare configs. Use a JSON config file. Test all operations. Write results to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
